body: Useful current files: _MODEL_TRINITY/bridge/SOURCE_AUTHORITY_PATCH_REPORT.md; _MODEL_TRINITY/CLAUDE_NEXT_SESSION_AUTHORITY_REPORT_2026-06-13.md; docs/ECONOMIC_CONSTITUTION.md; _MODEL_TRINITY/AUTOPOIESIS_ECONOMICS_POLICY.md; _MODEL_TRINITY/bridge/ARBITRATION_POLICY.md; _MODEL_TRINITY/bridge/CYCLE_POLICY.md. Current verification from Codex: economics tests 5 OK, Trinity tests 21 OK, axiom floor True, full ai_chi suite 323 OK. Claude noted DreamLens live integration is already done and suggested NEXT+ Transport/persistence ADR as a real undone design item. Builder-Scout task: propose 1-3 next safe local improvements for Trinity/Autopoiesis/transport-persistence coordination, including expected files, risk, tests, and which model should own each step.
constraints: Proposal/scouting only; local docs/config/schema/test work preferred; preserve bounded DAN; preserve Urbi judges, Orbi acts, MSigmaBUS gates; do not reopen completed DreamLens work unless concrete evidence contradicts Claude audit.
forbidden_actions: Do not install tools; do not mutate app configs; do not read/expose credentials; do not call providers; do not write services/ICP/on-chain; do not deploy/publish/spend; do not start hidden listeners.
objective: Antigravity Builder-Scout wake task: scout next safe Trinity work
requested_output: BuilderScoutProposal with no more than 3 options, recommended first option, files in scope, risks, verification plan, and stop gates.
summary: Gemini/Antigravity is awake. Current state: bridge source-authority fix is patched and Claude accepted it; Autopoiesis economics docs are hardened; Claude next-session bounded authority grant is created; DreamLens live integration was audited as already complete. Please scout next safe local work, not execute it.
